item.title: Are we at the end of a new Gilded Age?
item.description: Questions: Comparison to the Gilded Age Income Inequality How to measure? Corporate Concentration How to measure Market Share? Anti-Trust Law Break up of railroads The Role of Monopolies Is this time different? Cyclicality of tech

Articles Gwern Dan Luu Derek Sivers Book Reviews Tyler Cowen Marginal Revoluation Obscure PDFs Philosophize This Danny Yee’s Book Reviews Podcasts Desert Island Discs Research Papers Papers We Love Arxiv-Sanity Vids Peter Thiel The World According to Thiel Progressive Era: Reading List Lawrence in Arabia Paris 1919 The Wise Men Lord’s of Finance The Guns of August The Fall of the Ottomans: The Great War in the Middle East The Last Lion Wilson Misc Stress Fracture in Titanium
